facts.statement: A blue whale can consume 100,000 calories from a single mouthful of krill
facts.actual: A single mouthful can yield up to 457,141 kcal

facts.statement: A blue whale can weigh up to 100 tonnes
facts.actual: Blue whales can weigh up to 190–200 tonnes, making them the largest animal to have ever existed

facts.statement: The IWC banned blue whale hunting in 1950
facts.actual: The International Whaling Commission banned all blue whale hunting in 1966

facts.statement: The earliest blue whale fossil dates back 50,000 years
facts.actual: The earliest known blue whale fossil dates to the Early Pleistocene, roughly 1.5–1.25 million years ago

facts.statement: The oldest known blue whale was 80 years old
facts.actual: The oldest blue whale on record was found to be 110 years old
